clientMessages.author: max.hastings
clientMessages.content:
**Instagram → Facebook Auto Posting**

I did some research on this and found the exact setting Meta uses for this.

Path in the Instagram app:

Go to your Instagram profile
Tap the ☰ menu (top right)
Tap Accounts Center
Tap Sharing across profiles
Select Instagram → Facebook
Turn on “Your Instagram posts” (toggle)

When this is on, every new Instagram post automatically goes to Facebook.

The reverse (Facebook → Instagram)

You enable it from the same place:

Go to Facebook
Tap Create Post
Tap the Instagram toggle under your name

Or enable automatic sharing in:

Accounts Center → Sharing across profiles

Then Facebook posts can also publish to Instagram if the format is supported.
----------

**Lead Form (Simplified)**

The lead form was simplified exactly as you requested.

We removed all the small garage door option boxes and extra questions so the process is very straightforward now.

First Page (Welcome Page)

This is the first thing people see:

Get Your Garage Door Upgraded By a Trusted Local Expert!

Whether you need a quick lube and tune-up, help fixing an issue with your garage door, or even a full garage door replacement, I'm Hector, the owner of Lone Star Garage Repair, and I will take good care of you! My goal is simple: show up quickly, fix the problem the right way, and charge fair, honest prices.

We’ve earned 100+ five-star reviews by being reliable, doing quality work, and taking care of people the way we’d want someone to take care of our own home.

Just fill out the form and we’ll reach out shortly to schedule a time that works for you and get your garage door working properly again.

Looking forward to helping you out.

— Hector

After this page, the customer simply enters their contact information.

All the extra garage door questions were removed so the form is fast and easy.

Thank You Page

After submitting the form, this is the page they see:

Wait! One Last Step Before You Are Done

The next step is to pick a time for your appointment so I can come out and take care of the issue.

When I arrive, I'll take a look at your garage door, explain exactly what needs to be done, and in most cases fix it right on the spot at a fair price!

Click the blue button below to open the calendar and choose a time that works best for you. This will schedule a visit with Hector, the owner, to come out to your home.

Once you book, you’ll receive a text confirmation for your appointment.

Go ahead and click the blue button now to pick your time now!
